shows.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup
shows.description: Portugal vs. DR Congo in a Group K opener in Houston, Texas. At 41, Cristiano Ronaldo begins his sixth World Cup with eight career goals in the tournament, one shy of the nine scored by Eusebio in the 1966 World Cup alone, where Portugal finished third. Twenty years younger is Joao Neves, a midfield force to watch much like Noah Sadiki of DR Congo, which last made it here as Zaire in 1974.
